_meta.note: type=json -> legacy descriptor in Gist components-index.json; type=tsx -> file in this folder

n8n_signup_page.hint: n8n signup page with email input

basic_n8n_workflow.hint: Basic n8n canvas with connected nodes for a workflow.

n8n_interface_overview.hint: General N8N workflow canvas overview with sidebar and properties panel.

n8n_workflow_execution.hint: Pixel-faithful real n8n editor (light theme) running a workflow: nodes activate sequentially with spinner, green check badges, connections turn green with '1 item' labels and moving data dots. Configurable via scene.nodes [{label, icon: bolt|gear|globe|mail|db|brain|code|sheet, trigger, color}], scene.workflow_title, scene.item_label. USE for any 'workflow executes / run the workflow' narration.

n8n_data_packet_flow.hint: Teaches how external data enters n8n: external app window fires POST, a JSON payload card shrinks into a packet that travels into the Webhook trigger node, through processing, to a destination node. Configurable via scene.source_label, scene.payload (JSON string), scene.dest_label, scene.dest_icon. USE for webhook / API / data-flow explanations.

n8n_code_editor.hint: Real n8n Code node NDV modal: INPUT panel, JavaScript editor with frame-driven typing + syntax colors, 'Test step' click, OUTPUT panel populates. Configurable via scene.node_name, scene.code, scene.input_json, scene.output_json. USE for Code node / expression / JavaScript lessons.

step_flow_diagram.hint: Premium concept-scene diagram: 3-5 numbered step cards revealed progressively with drawn arrow connectors and a moving focus glow. Burmese font supported. Configurable via scene.heading, scene.steps [{title, desc}]. USE for process overview / architecture / summary scenes.

n8n_interface_tour.hint: Full real n8n editor UI (dark sidebar with menu, header with Active toggle + Save, canvas with nodes, add-node button, zoom controls) with cinematic camera that tours areas and highlights each with a focus ring. Configurable via scene.workflow_title, scene.tour array of overview|sidebar|canvas|header|addnode. USE for 'introducing the n8n interface' scenes.

n8n_credentials_menu.hint: Simulates navigating to n8n's credentials menu, clicking 'New Credential', and populating input fields for a Google OAuth credential.
